{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/log/oak/line.png
|block_health=8
|tool=[[Axe]]
|rotation=log
}}

== Obtaining ==
Oak logs can be collected from oak trees, which spawn in a wide variety of biomes, but often in more temperate areas.

== Usage ==
Logs can be crafted into 4 planks or 2 branches.

== History ==


* [[0.1.0]] - Texture was changed. Previous (<code>line</code>) texture was: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.0.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/log/oak/line.png
* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Logs]]
